issue_title: App CSS is not parsed out of blocks on first load (works after update)
issue_body_preview: This is probably happening since the inline CSS is sent down with parse messages, and isn't plumbed through the logic for initial loading. The difference between those two doesn't really need to exist, but the work hasn't been done to refactor that yet.
test_description_zh: 首次加载包含 CSS 样式定义的 Eve 应用页面，观察页面元素是否正确应用了在 block 中定义的 CSS 样式。然后刷新页面，再次检查样式是否一致。
expected_result_zh: 首次加载页面时，应用中通过 block 定义的 CSS 样式应立即正确解析并应用到对应的页面元素上，样式表现与后续更新/刷新后的效果一致，不会出现首次加载时样式缺失或未生效的情况。
